title: The Violet Hour Arrives
provenance: Something behind my eyes has turned the color of bruises healing backwards. I sit very still in rooms where everyone else is moving, watching them through this new filter that makes their words sound like they're coming from underwater.
threshold_note: The moment when knowing arrives before language does.
collector_meaning: You hold the exact second when understanding floods in but the mouth stays closed. This is what it costs to see clearly while staying silent.
